headline: Quest Diagnostics Prices $500 Million of Senior Notes
summary: Quest Diagnostics Incorporated (NYSE: DGX) (the "Company"), a leader in diagnostic information services, today announced the pricing of a public offering of $500 million aggregate principal amount of its 5.000% senior notes due 2036 (the "Notes") under Quest Diagnostics' shelf registration statement.
